calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2017 Off Calendar

Motion For Default Judgment Prove-Up
Off Calendar May-18-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Stephen M. Murphy, Clerk: J. Bertelsen, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098.

Alisa J. Kim, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, National Collegiate Student Loan Trust 2007-4
Order Granting waiver of Witness Requirement of Hearing on Application for Default Prove-up, on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendants Aliamore H. Powell and Harrell Powell.
Default of Defendants have been duly entered.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages: $29,833.11
Pre-Judgment Interest: $0
Attorney's Fees: $0
Costs: $648.80
Total Judgment in the amount of $30,481.91
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-03-2017 Continued To Jul-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jan-27-2017 Continued To Apr-19-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
